name: license-attribution sweep validates that a community-installed plugin honors its declared license metadata
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example && printf 'name: example\nlicense: MIT\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/license-attribution.sh" --check-plugins 2>out.txt && grep -q 'plugin=example license=MIT valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
